description: Use this API to write the capability curve data in the working case in the form of a Capability Curve Raw Data File. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = writecapcurves(sid, all, status, out, ofile)
python_syntax: ierr = writecapcurves(sid, all, status, out, ofile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All machines or those in the specified subsystem. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the file to which data records are to be written (when out is 0). (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only machines in subsystem SID.

status.description: include records for out-of-service machines (1 by default).
‘IC” value on the first record (0 by default).
for API routine ReadCapCurves with IC=0.
for API routine ReadCapCurves with IC=1.

out.description: direct output to a data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
capability curve data is not in the working case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
